message.content:
@startuml
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 40
  BoxPadding 10
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBorderThickness 1
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
  ActorBorderColor #666666
  ActorBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
  ArrowColor #000000
  ArrowThickness 2
  MessageAlign left
  AltBorderColor #000000
  AltBorderThickness 3
  AltBackgroundColor transparent
  GroupBorderColor #000000
  GroupBorderThickness 3
  GroupBackgroundColor transparent
}

actor user
participant student
participant teacher

user -> student : 查看
student --> user : 返回结果

alt [user:teacher]
  user -> teacher : 查看
  teacher --> user : 返回结果
end

@enduml
